_about: Consumer-side binding for CANON-KNOWLEDGE-NATIVE-VT-METHOD-001. DevKit defines method/artifacts; L3 declares roots, triggers, adapter, and optional engines.

knowledgeMemoryAdapter.name: vibethink-default
knowledgeMemoryAdapter.freshnessCheck: L3 declares how Engram/Graphify indexes are checked for staleness; stale or unavailable adapters must surface RED/WARN locally.

engram.role: memory/facts/recall engine for cross-session retrieval; not source of truth

graphify.role: graph/indexing engine for relationships, communities, and semantic navigation; not source of truth

markdown.role: versioned Knowledge Pack files; auditable source of truth
